channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characte…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.
item.content:encoded: Netflix's new Little House series features the same characters and setting as the original, but its reliance on hand-held cameras, in extreme close-up, calls too much attention to itself.

item.description:
DOMOTO、STARTO ENTERTAINMENTとのエージェント契約満了

堂本光一＆堂本剛が連名コメント
「僕たち自身でグループ活動のマネジメントを行っていく運びとなりました」
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680337?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#DOMOTO

item.title: A wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 11 people, …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: A wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 11 people, making it one of the country's deadliest on record, as soaring temperatures grip much of the country. n.pr/4wAGsFd
item.content:encoded: A wildfire in southern Spain has killed at least 11 people, making it one of the country's deadliest on record, as soaring temperatures grip much of the country. n.pr/4wAGsFd

item.title: Jack White invites Satanic doo-wop duo Twin Temple to open a…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Jack White invites Satanic doo-wop duo Twin Temple to open a show after Charley Crockett drops them for being Satanic
item.content:encoded: Jack White invites Satanic doo-wop duo Twin Temple to open a show after Charley Crockett drops them for being Satanic

item.title: The investigation continues into the death of a Black teenag…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The investigation continues into the death of a Black teenager in Mississippi whose body was found after he was left on an island.
item.content:encoded: The investigation continues into the death of a Black teenager in Mississippi whose body was found after he was left on an island.

item.title: President Trump says he is refusing to sign the bill without…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump says he is refusing to sign the bill without Congress first passing his sweeping voter ID bill. n.pr/4vsARjl
item.content:encoded: President Trump says he is refusing to sign the bill without Congress first passing his sweeping voter ID bill. n.pr/4vsARjl

item.title: ［週間アクセスランキング］まる子と花輪クンも来た 今週の注目記事（7/2～7/8） ■Ado日産スタジアム公演レ…

今週の注目記事（7/2～7/8）
■Ado日産スタジアム公演レポ
■大野、櫻井、相葉が動き出した
■山下達郎が全国ホールツアー開催
https://natalie.mu/music/news/680329?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

item.title: We're in that phase of summer pop doldrums when the same son…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: We're in that phase of summer pop doldrums when the same songs seem to be on repeat week after week. Can Stella Lefty, Yung Miami or Malcolm Todd make a run to crack the top 10? n.pr/4eVUNGb
item.content:encoded: We're in that phase of summer pop doldrums when the same songs seem to be on repeat week after week. Can Stella Lefty, Yung Miami or Malcolm Todd make a run to crack the top 10? n.pr/4eVUNGb

item.title: Republicans on Capitol Hill are starting to talk about one f…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Republicans on Capitol Hill are starting to talk about one facet of immigration reform: how to expand the popular H-2A visa program for farm laborers. They face obstacles. n.pr/4bzboNM
item.content:encoded: Republicans on Capitol Hill are starting to talk about one facet of immigration reform: how to expand the popular H-2A visa program for farm laborers. They face obstacles. n.pr/4bzboNM

item.title: “The fierce lions and eagles on Trump’s arch would be more a…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
“The fierce lions and eagles on Trump’s arch would be more at home in the Chronicles of Narnia than standing guard in Trump’s Situation Room... The better symbol there would be a jackass.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
“The fierce lions and eagles on Trump’s arch would be more at home in the Chronicles of Narnia than standing guard in Trump’s Situation Room... The better symbol there would be a jackass.”

More: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: “To Trump, a modest Washington, with its low limestone build…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
“To Trump, a modest Washington, with its low limestone buildings and reflective memorials, is a city for losers.”

More ↓
item.content:encoded:
“To Trump, a modest Washington, with its low limestone buildings and reflective memorials, is a city for losers.”

More ↓

item.title: “There’s an unmistakable theme to Trump’s Washington makeove…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
“There’s an unmistakable theme to Trump’s Washington makeover, aside from his own desperate sprint against mortality. Trump wants the city to project American might and dominance, the gaudier the better.”

Read: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
“There’s an unmistakable theme to Trump’s Washington makeover, aside from his own desperate sprint against mortality. Trump wants the city to project American might and dominance, the gaudier the better.”

Read: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: Trump Is Turning D.C. Into a Theme Park for the American Cen…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Trump Is Turning D.C. Into a Theme Park for the American Century

The president erects monuments to the nation's greatness at home, while undermining it all over the world.

Read @mattbaidc.bsky.social's commentary: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Trump Is Turning D.C. Into a Theme Park for the American Century

The president erects monuments to the nation's greatness at home, while undermining it all over the world.

Read @mattbaidc.bsky.social's commentary: www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: When the U.S. brokered a ceasefire last year, Israel control…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: When the U.S. brokered a ceasefire last year, Israel controlled half of Gaza. Now Israeli forces have pushed deeper, and Palestinians are paying a deadly price. n.pr/4h6GQGN
item.content:encoded: When the U.S. brokered a ceasefire last year, Israel controlled half of Gaza. Now Israeli forces have pushed deeper, and Palestinians are paying a deadly price. n.pr/4h6GQGN

item.title: A man dressed as a purple bong named Bongholeo performed a b…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: A man dressed as a purple bong named Bongholeo performed a bong-themed Lizzo parody at a New Jersey town hall. Then another speaker was arrested after singing Morrissey past his time limit. Just another day in local government.
item.content:encoded: A man dressed as a purple bong named Bongholeo performed a bong-themed Lizzo parody at a New Jersey town hall. Then another speaker was arrested after singing Morrissey past his time limit. Just another day in local government.

item.title: Several victims of the fire in the southern province of Alme…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Several victims of the fire in the southern province of Almeria, a popular holiday destination, were found inside burnt-out vehicles and were thought to have died while trying to flee the flames. n.pr/4pdFeNq
item.content:encoded: Several victims of the fire in the southern province of Almeria, a popular holiday destination, were found inside burnt-out vehicles and were thought to have died while trying to flee the flames. n.pr/4pdFeNq

item.title: Fighting between the U.S. and Iran appears to have paused af…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Fighting between the U.S. and Iran appears to have paused after two days of clashing amid a shaky ceasefire. And, a look at what life is like inside Israel's expanding zone of control in Gaza. n.pr/4pavLXi
item.content:encoded: Fighting between the U.S. and Iran appears to have paused after two days of clashing amid a shaky ceasefire. And, a look at what life is like inside Israel's expanding zone of control in Gaza. n.pr/4pavLXi
